Shared Savings Program — Accountable Care Organizations (SSP ACO)
2022 Provider File
Version — March 2026
Variable SAS name Short description Long description Type Length
NPI NPI National Provider Identifier (NPI) for practitioner National Provider Identifier of a supplier associated with ACO participants in one of the following ways: (1) reassigned billing rights to an ACO participant during the performance period, based on information in the Medicare Provider Enrollment, Chain, and Ownership
